parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Team Member" as TM
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as UI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as Controller
participant ":DataManagement" as DM
participant "projectStore : ProjectStore" as PS
participant "project : Project" as P

activate TM
TM -> UI : 1 Starts the Task creation in User Story
activate UI
UI --> TM : 2 request the project code
deactivate UI

TM -> UI : 3 Inserts the project code
activate UI
UI --> TM : 4 request sprint id
deactivate UI

TM -> UI : 5 Inserts the sprint id
activate UI
UI --> TM : 6 request user story id
deactivate UI

TM -> UI : 7 Inserts the user story id
activate UI
UI --> TM : 8 request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
deactivate UI

TM -> UI : 9 Inserts request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 10 createTaskInUserStory(code, sprintID, userStoryID, name, description, type, startDate, endDate)
activate Controller

Controller -> DM : 11 projectStore = getProjectStore()
activate DM
DM --> Controller : 12 projectStore
deactivate DM

Controller -> PS : 13 project = getProjectByCode(code)
activate PS
PS --> Controller : 14 project
deactivate PS

Controller -> P : 15 getSprintByID(sprintID)
activate P
ref over P : TaskCreationInUserStory
P --> Controller : 16 true
deactivate P

Controller --> UI : 17 true
deactivate Controller

UI --> TM : 18 Task created successfully
deactivate UI
deactivate TM

@enduml
```
